package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"net/http"
)

type PositiveQueryPathAndBodyMergeRequest struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status"`
}

func PositiveQueryPathAndBodyMergePerformedInHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	var req PositiveQueryPathAndBodyMergeRequest
	_ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&req)
	req.TenantID = c.Query("tenant_id")
	req.ID = c.Param("id")
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": req.ID, "tenant": req.TenantID, "status": req.Status})
}
